name: salmon-science-research
description: Open-source salmon ecology, conservation, and management-science workflows with routing, normalization, and source-specific skills.

interface.shortDescription: Open-source salmon ecology, conservation, and management research workflows
interface.longDescription: Open-source salmon research workflows that help Codex interpret salmon ecology, conservation, and management questions, normalize salmon entities, route to source-specific skills, and synthesize evidence-backed answers across public salmon-science platforms.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current evidence for this salmon stock or unit.
Find the best salmon data sources for telemetry, status, and habitat.
Route this salmon research question to the right public platforms.
